recipes.title: Gen AI Remake
recipes.description: AI-generated remake of a classic scene or concept. Before/after transformation style with glitch and AI visual effects.
recipes.prompt: Create a before/after transformation. Start with original style, transition through AI processing effects (glitch, pixel sort, neural style), reveal the AI remake. Show the transformation as a journey.
recipes.cut_style: Eisenstein overtonal. Conflict between old/new, analog/digital. Glitch transitions, datamosh effects, hard juxtapositions.

recipes.title: Meme Culture React
recipes.description: Meme reaction format for social media. Zoom effects, bold text, irreverent tone. Quick punchy cuts with text overlays.
recipes.prompt: Start with a reaction trigger. Build with zoom-ins and bold text overlays. Hit the punchline hard. Use meme formatting — Impact font, white outlines, dramatic zooms.
recipes.cut_style: Tonal montage. Emotional contrast between scenes. Zoom cuts for emphasis. Text should feel like meme captions.

recipes.title: News Overview 30s
recipes.description: Knackige Zusammenfassung eines News-Beitrags. Hook -> Context -> Key Fact -> Wrap.
recipes.prompt: Fasse die Kernfakten des Artikels zusammen. Wähle 4-6 klare B-Roll Szenen. Fokus auf Information.
recipes.cut_style: Klare harte Schnitte (Dmytryk). Bild steht so lange, bis die Info vermittelt ist.

recipes.title: On Air Promo (Longform)
recipes.description: 'Nächste Woche bei...' Teaser aus einer langen Sendung. Inklusive Liquid-Text Motion Graphics.
recipes.prompt: Finde die spannendsten und visuell stärksten Momente. Ignoriere sprechende Köpfe. Baue einen Spannungsbogen.
recipes.cut_style: Rhythmisch, passend zum Musik-Beat. Schnelle Schnitte am Anfang, lange Holds bei Key-Visuals.

recipes.title: Product Landing Page
recipes.description: Clean product showcase video. Hero shot, feature highlights, pricing CTA. Modern, minimal, sales-driven.
recipes.prompt: Open with a hero product shot. Reveal 3 key features with clean animations. Close with pricing and CTA. Every frame should sell. No filler.
recipes.cut_style: Dmytryk clean cuts. Each shot stays as long as it takes to communicate the feature. No wasted frames. Substance over style.

recipes.title: Social Clip 9:16
recipes.description: Vertikaler Clip für Instagram/TikTok. Fokus auf Hook, Punchline und schnelle Action.
recipes.prompt: Hook in den ersten 1.5s! Wähle Szenen mit viel Bewegung. Center-Crop-safe (wichtig für 9:16).
recipes.cut_style: Metric Montage. Sehr schnelle Schnitte, maximal 2-3s pro Clip.
